title: Halves
description: Practice dividing shapes into 2 equal sections.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which picture divides a rectangle into halves?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
You can divide a whole into $2$ equal parts.

The equal parts are called **halves**.

This rectangle is divided into halves.

![A rectangle with a diagonal line from the top right to the bottom left corner dividing it into 2 parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21cb767a1a3af4ac3de41d5ccca30898.png)  
It has $2$ equal parts.

choices.content: ![A rectangle with a diagonal line from the top right to the bottom left corner dividing it into 2 parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21cb767a1a3af4ac3de41d5ccca30898.png)
![A rectangle with 2 horizontal lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/a9c69c6911a4d6f1608477030d2a8210.png)
![A rectangle with a horizontal line and a diagonal line dividing it into 3 unequal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4ec7e38db1d90bc7a5220426a0eda6f1.png)
![A rectangle with 2 vertical lines dividing it into 3 equal parts.](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/9731733f6d0d8747f636f93c238882e5.png)

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the rectangle divided into halves?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/21cb767a1a3af4ac3de41d5ccca30898.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $2$ equal parts, it is divided into **halves**.



Is the rectangle divided into $2$ equal parts?
Yes, the rectangle is divided into halves.

choices.content: Yes
No

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the circle divided into halves?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1764e983baf080eec056b9b0d5e6b28c.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $2$ equal parts, it is divided into **halves**.



Is the circle divided into $2$ equal parts?
Yes, the circle is divided into halves.

choices.content: Yes
No

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the rectangle divided into halves?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/155ea1d9d42cfc4d93aad38c839b62ca.png)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $2$ equal parts, it is divided into **halves**.



Is the rectangle divided into $2$ equal parts?
No, one part is larger than the other part.
No, the rectangle is **not** divided into halves.

choices.content: Yes
No

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the square divided into halves?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ffce1a4f425fd633b05dd5b7253d1e38.png)


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $2$ equal parts, it is divided into **halves**.



Is the square divided into $2$ equal parts?
No, the square is divided into $3$ equal parts.
No, the square is **not** divided into halves.

choices.content: Yes
No

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the circle divided into halves?**

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d681e053d1cbed50996ca8c9e3298275.png)


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $2$ equal parts, it is divided into **halves**.



Is the circle divided into $2$ equal parts?
No, one part is larger than the other part.
No, the circle is **not** divided into halves.

choices.content: Yes
No

assessment_items.question_content:
**Is the circle divided into halves?**

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/90a3d54f913974b692b19f44ba18bca0a196fbca)


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
When we divide a whole into $2$ equal parts, it is divided into **halves**.



Is the circle divided into $2$ equal parts?
No, there are $3$ parts, and they are not equal size parts.
No, the circle is **not** divided into halves.

choices.content: Yes
No
